data.title: PROtect opens new location in North Dakota, serving Upper Midwest, Northern Plains. Expands reach to more customers.
data.description: PROtect, LLC, a renowned provider of safety, reliability, and compliance solutions, unveiled the establishment of a new regional office in North Dakota. This strategic move enhances the company's capacity to cater to clients in the Upper Midwest and Northern Plains regions. The expansion signifies a significant milestone in PROtect's growth trajectory.

data.title: Florida Realtors® is offering a Student Scholarship Program for students interested in real estate-related careers.
data.description: Discover more about the Student Scholarship Program provided by Florida Realtors® for college students and high school graduates interested in real estate careers. This initiative aims to support students pursuing careers in the real estate industry. The program offers scholarships to assist with educational expenses and career development opportunities. If you have children in college or soon-to-be high school graduates looking to explore real estate-related professions, this program could be beneficial for them. Apply now to take advantage of this opportunity.

data.description: The price of gold surged past $5,100, while Ethereum struggled to stay below $3,000. Prediction market participants had accurately forecasted these trends months in advance.

data.title: XRP aims for $2.40 in Feb after surpassing $1.95; Analysts predict $4 EOY. Current setup favors $2.40 if momentum grows.
data.description: XRP is displaying a promising uptrend above a critical resistance level of $1.95, prompting analysts to predict a potential surge to $4 by the end of the year. The current technical analysis indicates a near-term target of $2.40 if momentum continues to strengthen.

data.title: Ferrari N.V. purchased shares worth Euro 250 million as the first tranche of a buyback program of Euro 3.5 billion by 2030.
data.description: Ferrari N.V. has disclosed that they have bought back a significant amount of common shares under their Euro 250 million share repurchase plan that was initially declared on December 16, 2025. This buyback is part of a larger multi-year program totaling around Euro 3.5 billion set to be completed by 2030, as outlined in the 2025 Capital Markets Day. This initial tranche of shares was purchased on the Euronext Milan (EXM) stock exchange, with exact figures of the shares bought being provided in aggregate on a daily basis.

data.title: ETH aims for $3,200-$3,400 rebound in Feb despite bearish trend. Trading at $2,886; analyst predicts 16% rise to $3,376. Key resistance at $3,024.
data.description: The current trading price of Ethereum is $2,886, indicating a bearish MACD trend, yet analysts predict a potential 16% increase to $3,376 by February. For a bullish trend to continue, Ethereum needs to surpass the critical resistance level of $3,024.
